title: IBM presents advances in chip miniaturization with subnanometer technology
summary: The company announces a new method to manufacture smaller components and reveals its first chip technology below 1 nanometer, marking a milestone in the semiconductor industry.

title: Xbox raises the price of its consoles by up to $150 in August and worsens the market crisis
summary: The price increase is applied worldwide due to the component crisis, while PlayStation 5 is also sold at a loss, deepening the critical situation in the console sector.
